exploration_notes: Found 7 Java source files under flink-streaming-java/src/main/ with @Deprecated annotations on DataStream API classes related to source functions, sink functions, timestamp extractors, and I/O format classes. Methodology: searched both Sourcegraph (github.com/apache/flink) and the local clone for @Deprecated annotations, then read each file to confirm the class-level deprecation and extract the recommended replacement from the javadoc. The deprecated classes and their replacements are: (1) DataG
